title: ranevea
side_effects: Ranevea can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of alkaloids. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to respiratory issues, including shortness of breath and wheezing. Long-term use without proper guidance can also result in liver damage and increased heart rate. Additionally, improper preparation of the plant can cause gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea and stomach cramps.
